title: E7 9NA, Hovis Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/VP3732VD/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Hovis Limited   Installation name: Forest Gate Bakery   Permit number: EPR/VP3732VD/V002   "
